actions.title: Active Thread — Falcon LLM
actions.body: Tom Sherwood (Falcon LLM team) replied twice today. Message 1 (9am): "Of course, python is fine. Would you like me to re-book your live coding with Olivier?" Message 2 (5pm): "Just emailed you new booking link :-)" — You have an unsent draft reply in Gmail asking for comp range and remote policy. Send or schedule it now.

actions.title: Awaiting Reply — Stripe (3 days)
actions.body: Sent follow-up on 2026-03-30 asking about equity vesting and remote policy. No response yet.

results.subject: Infrastructure Engineer opportunity at Anthropic
results.reason: Exact role match — Linux infra, sandboxing systems work at a leading AI company. Strong engineering reputation, well-funded. Seattle hybrid likely but remote sometimes available; confirm.
results.comp_assessment: Top-tier AI company comp. Expect $250k–$350k TC range for Staff-level infra. Above target floor, equity likely substantial.
results.reply_draft:
Hi Sarah,

Thanks for reaching out — the sandboxing infrastructure work at Anthropic sounds like a strong fit.

A few questions before we move forward:

1. What’s the total comp range for this role (base + equity)?
2. What’s the remote/hybrid policy for this position?
3. Can you share an overview of the interview process?

Looking forward to hearing more.

Best,
Paul

results.subject: Senior Software Engineer, Systems at Anthropic
results.reason: Systems engineering at a top-tier AI company. Role aligns with infrastructure background. Likely competitive comp.
results.comp_assessment: AI top-tier. Should clear floor easily at senior+ level.

results.subject: Google Cloud Observability - Staff SRE
results.reason: Staff SRE at Google Cloud — strong whitelist match. Observability is core SRE domain. Confirm location and hybrid expectations.
results.comp_assessment: Google L6/L7 SRE comp ranges $350k–$500k+ TC. Well above target.
results.reply_draft:
Hi Mike,

Appreciate you reaching out about the Cloud Observability SRE role — this is right in my wheelhouse.

A few things I’d like to understand:

1. What locations is this role based in?
2. What’s the remote/hybrid policy?
3. How large is the current team?

Thanks,
Paul

results.subject: AI Infrastructure / Platform Engineer at AMD
results.role: AI Infrastructure / Platform Engineer — GPU Compute
results.reason: AI infra platform work at a major chip company. Comp listed in range. Interesting GPU compute angle.
results.comp_assessment: $192k–$288k listed. Floor at $225k falls within range — negotiable to target. Low end is tight but top end is above floor.

results.subject: Staff Software Engineer - Platform / Infrastructure at Redrecruit
results.reason: Staff-level platform/infra role. Comp starts at $225k — right at floor, top $285k above target base. Unknown company; vet funding and engineering reputation before applying.
results.comp_assessment: Comp starts at floor ($225k). $285k top is solid but not exceptional for Staff in NYC. Need to confirm TC includes equity.
results.reply_draft:
Hi Alex,

Thanks for reaching out about the Staff Platform role.

Before I can evaluate further, could you share:

1. Some background on Redrecruit — funding stage, engineering team size?
2. What’s the remote/hybrid policy?
3. What does total comp look like beyond base (equity, bonus)?

Thanks,
Paul

results.subject: Senior / Staff Site Reliability Engineer at Radar
results.reason: SRE role at a location tech company. Comp listed at $200k–$300k — within range. Unclear on company engineering quality. Indeed match.
results.comp_assessment: $200k–$300k listed. Floor reachable. Mid-range for NYC SRE.

results.subject: Distinguished Engineer at Capital One
results.reason: Distinguished Engineer is a top IC track — above Staff. Capital One has a real tech org. Worth looking at comp.
results.comp_assessment: Capital One DE comp varies widely. Could be $300k–$450k+ TC. Fintech, so cash-heavy. Verify.
results.reply_draft:
Hi Jennifer,

Thanks for reaching out about the Distinguished Engineer role.

I’d like to learn more:

1. What’s the comp range for this level?
2. What’s the remote/hybrid policy?
3. What tech stack does this team work with?

Best,
Paul

results.subject: Principal SRE at Barclays
results.reason: Principal-level SRE at a major bank. Fintech fits target industry. Confirm US vs UK location before pursuing. Comp at banks for Principal SRE can be strong with cash bonus.
results.comp_assessment: Bank principal SRE: $250k–$400k TC likely, heavy cash bonus. Depends on US vs UK.
results.reply_draft:
Hi David,

Thanks for reaching out about the Principal SRE role.

A few questions:

1. Is this role based in the US or UK?
2. What’s the total comp range?
3. What’s the remote/hybrid policy?

Thanks,
Paul

results.subject: Exciting opportunity!
results.reason: Generic mass email — no name, no company details, boilerplate.
